description: Discover signal feeds ranked by proven edge, rank publishers, and subscribe + track results.
name: io.github.nirholas/signals-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves the signal-marketplace endpoints. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for the live marketplace reads and subscription writes.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: three.ws API key (sk_live_… / sk_test_…) for the account-scoped follower tools (get_subscriptions, subscribe_signal, set_subscription_status). Optional — the public discovery and leaderboard tools work without it. subscribe_signal in live mode spends real USDC, so treat this key like cash.
environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_API_KEY

title: three.ws Signals
